input.title: [iOS PWA] clearThought on top of thought does not set browser selection
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

1. Create a thought 
2. Swipe right-left on top of the thought to activate `clearThought`

## Current Behavior

Keyboard opens, but browser selection is not set. Typing will do nothing. 

## Expected Behavior

`clearThought` should work regardless of where the swipe occurs.
